Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Well then, uh... guess I'll see ya. Gotta go home and study.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Hey, remember what I told you before? About finally finding my dream?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}I never had anything to work towards until now, so I'll admit I'd been slacking off.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}To be honest, my grades really suck! It's been tough getting them back up.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}And that's why... I need to work harder.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Ugh, I really, REALLY want to hang out with you, {f 4 1}-kun![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}And I... want to feel closer to you too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}But I gotta be patient! That's what I have to keep telling myself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}I wanna take my dream into my own hands, and stand next to you with my head held high.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}I want us to walk towards the future together...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_9_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}You just watch, I'm gonna be so much more irresistible by then.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}I bet you'll fall in love with me all over again![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}But that's why I need to be patient for now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Don't they say that food tastes the best after you've tried your hardest in a match?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Well, this is just like that. If we're patient now and cool off for a while, then maybe later on...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 2 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Wait, what are you even making me say!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}A-Anyway, that's all I have to say. See ya. We'll hang out sometime soon![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Yep! I've been doing it every day. Aren't I awesome?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}Pretty much. I gotta get back and study.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}Hey, remember what I told you before? About finally finding my dream?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}I never had anything to work towards until now, so I'll admit I'd been slacking off.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}To be honest, my grades really suck! It's been tough getting them back up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}Like, I have no idea what chemistry and all that stuff is about. Seriously, it's like a foreign language.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}To tell you the truth, I really just wanna sit back and enjoy life![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}But I gotta be patient! That's what I have to keep telling myself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}I'm gonna take my dreams into my own hands![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}And then I'm gonna do some more studying, and then get a job.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}But after that, we should totally hang out again! We can invite everyone from the track team too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_9_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}...Ooh, how about we have a drinking party, since we'll all be adults by then![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}I'll be focusing only on my studies for now. So don't try to tempt me with anything![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Today I'm gonna work on three subjects at once. Impressive, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}Oops, I better get going. I still need to buy dinner.[n]{f 1 1}
